content.query:
DROP VIEW [ODS].[vw_lkp_LP_Dispositions]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE VIEW [ODS].[vw_lkp_LP_Dispositions]
AS SELECT
[descr]
,[id]
,'FHI' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_dsp_Dispositions]
 
 UNION

SELECT
[descr]
,[id]
,'PHI' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_PHI_dsp_Dispositions]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
[descr]
,[id]
,'HSI' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_HSI_dsp_Dispositions]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
[descr]
,[id]
,'RTW' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_RTW_dsp_Dispositions]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
[descr]
,[id]
,'MAC' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_MAC_dsp_Dispositions]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
[descr]
,[id]
,'SWR' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_SWR_dsp_Dispositions]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
[descr]
,[id]
,'PBC' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_PBC_dsp_Dispositions]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
[descr]
,[id]
,'MXH' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_MXH_dsp_Dispositions]
 
  UNION

 SELECT
[descr]
,[id]
,'CTA' as Division
 FROM [ODS].[LP_CTA_dsp_Dispositions];
GO
